entries.text: The basement features Movies, Games, and Proxies. We spent a while on this so please take a look at all of the people that made this happen.

For the spring break update, we will be dropping a link/file to a download that will have all of our Basement features, but will be all available through a file. We are currently working on transferring all tabs, features, links, and files over to the files, but this will be our spring break update along with more proxies accessible through the file. We will be making a private doc for the Owners and their main friend group (We also might add others too if we feel nice lol) . This doc will become a less updated version with less proxies than the private version.
Will Be Released On Mar 27 2026 at 7:35 AM

This is where you can apply to be a staff member, fill out this google form below, there is a good chance you will be chosen if you go for a needed role. If you get accepted you will most likely get an editor role.
Updates Will Happen Every Weekend And Some Will Be Added Mid-Week And Will Be Released Every Sunday Night or Early Monday Morning. All Updates Will Be Posted Here.
Released The Doc And Added Quick Music Room
Added New Additional Games Folders Tab and Added 50 Folder Of Games To It As Our Update
Added The Full Original Game Stash
Added Announcements Tab And New File Unblock Method

People who are banned from the doc will be noted here with the reason, severity, length of ban, and if they are unbanned . When unbanned each person will receive an email notifying them of a few important things..
Yoel Lee - Reason: Used Copied Information To Make Their Own Doc. 100 days (Unbanned)
Asher - Reason: Used Copied Information To Make Their Own. Also tried to snitch for us banning him. Doc. 100 days (Unbanned)
3.Rajah Grewal- Reason: He copied information manually to make his own doc. Severity of Ban: ⅗ (50 Day Ban) (Unbanned)

This Is The Movie Room, We Have Tons Of Movies, They Are All Sorted Into Different Sections. We Are No Longer Adding Movies, So If There Is A Movie You Really Want Added, Go To The Suggestions Tab, And We Will Add It When We See It.
